title: WildFly Deployment Scanner Hot-Deploy Activity
dataSources: `index=web` `sourcetype=jboss:server` deployment scanner and WFLYSRV deployment messages
app: Splunk Universal Forwarder; Splunk Add-on for JMX (`Splunk_TA_jmx`); file monitoring for `jboss:server`, structured audit for `wildfly:audit`
spl:
index=web sourcetype="jboss:server"
| regex _raw="(?i)(WFLYSRV00(1|2|4)|Deployed.*\.war|Undeployed)"
| stats count by host, _raw
| sort - count
description: The deployment scanner can add or replace deployments automatically. Unexpected deploy messages may indicate compromised CI/CD credentials or mis-scoped directories.
value: Strengthens change control on Java middleware.
implementation: Set deployment scanner logging to INFO in dev-like environments; alert on deploy events outside maintenance on prod.
visualization: Time series for pool/queue metrics, top stats for failures, event timeline for deploys.
grandmaExplanation: We log unexpected deploy and undeploy actions that can change production behavior.
